title: echinacea atrorubens var. neglecta
intro: Echinacea atrorubens var. neglecta, also known as Black Samson, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the eastern United States. It is a perennial plant known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Echinacea atrorubens var. neglecta include its potential to prevent the common cold and flu, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with allergies and respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or supplement, and its root and flowers are used in herbal preparations to promote overall health and well-being.
